introSection: Dragon Gorge Scenic Railroad was a wooden side friction roller coaster located at Fraser's Million Dollar Pier in Venice, California, USA. It was located on the beach. It was destroyed by fire a year after it opened, on September 3, 1912.
fullText: Dragon Gorge Scenic Railroad was a wooden side friction roller coaster located at Fraser's Million Dollar Pier in Venice, California, USA. It was located on the beach. It was destroyed by fire a year after it opened, on September 3, 1912.
